violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2024

Single service knives are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Employee with gloves on flipped knives. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2023
